title: coelogyne suratii
intro: Coelogyne suratii, also known as the 'Rat Tail Orchid', is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne suratii include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Coelogyne suratii is often used in decoctions, infusions, or as a paste, and is said to be beneficial for skin and respiratory health.
